use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADVANCED HORMONE-DEPENDENT BREAST CANCER

indications.text:
1.1 Adjuvant Treatment of Postmenopausal Women
AROMASIN is indicated for adjuvant treatment of postmenopausal women with estrogen-receptor positive early
breast cancer who have received two to three years of tamoxifen and are switched to AROMASIN for completion of a total of
